mapper.insert: /* oms-master-accountBatch-sql-oracle.xml - insertErpAccountIntfInfo */ INSERT INTO TORDER_MST_AC ( OWKEY , ACKEY , ACNM , ACGRP , ACSTATUS , ADDR1 , ADDR2 , SALESPERSONNM , TEL1 , IFYN , DELYN , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT #{owkey} , B.ACKEY , MAX(B.ACNM) AS ACNM , MAX(B.ACTYPE) AS ACTYPE , MAX(B.ACSTATUS) AS ACSTATUS , MAX(B.ADDRHD) AS ADDRHD , MAX(B.ADDRDT) AS ADDRDT , MAX(B.SALESPERSONNM) AS SALESPERSONNM , MAX(B.TEL1) AS TEL1 , 'Y' AS IFYN , 'N' AS DELYN , #{sysdate} AS INSERTDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS INSERTURKEY , #{sysdate} AS UPDATEDATE , #{interfaceUrkey} AS UPDATEURKE FROM TORDER_EAI_AC_BATCH B LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_AC M ON B.ACKEY = M.ACKEY WHERE B.TRN_ID = #{trnId} AND M.ACKEY IS NULL GROUP BY B.ACKEY
mapper.update: /* oms-master-accountBatch-sql-oracle.xml - updateErpAccountIntfInfo */ UPDATE TORDER_MST_AC M SET ( ACNM , ACGRP , ACSTATUS , ADDR1 , ADDR2 , SALESPERSONNM , TEL1 ) = ( SELECT MAX(B.ACNM) , MAX(B.ACTYPE) , MAX(B.ACSTATUS) , MAX(B.ADDRHD) , MAX(B.ADDRDT) , MAX(B.SALESPERSONNM) , MAX(B.TEL1) FROM TORDER_EAI_AC_BATCH B WHERE B.TRN_ID = #{trnId} AND B.ACKEY = M.ACKEY GROUP BY B.ACKEY ) WHERE EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM TORDER_EAI_AC_BATCH B WHERE B.TRN_ID = #{trnId} AND B.ACKEY = M.ACKEY )
mapper.insert: /* oms-master-accountBatch-sql-oracle.xml - insertErpAccountCtIntinfo */ INSERT INTO TORDER_MST_ACXCT ( OWKEY , ACKEY , CTKEY , IFYN , DELYN , INSERTDATE , INSERTURKEY , UPDATEDATE , UPDATEURKEY ) SELECT #{owkey} , B.ACKEY , B.CTKEY , 'Y' , 'N' , #{sysdate} , #{interfaceUrkey} , #{sysdate} , #{interfaceUrkey} FROM TORDER_EAI_AC_BATCH B LEFT JOIN TORDER_MST_ACXCT M ON B.ACKEY = M.ACKEY AND B.CTKEY = M.CTKEY WHERE B.TRN_ID = #{trnId} AND M.ACKEY IS NULL AND B.CTKEY IS NOT NULL GROUP BY B.ACKEY, B.CTKEY
